# Semantic Segmentation

**Summary**: The process of classifying each pixel in an image into a category.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2025-ferreira|Ferreira, 2025]] applied semantic segmentation to identify mineral boundaries and types.

## Scientific Context

- [[2025-ferreira|Ferreira, 2025]] Segmentation is critical for quantifying mineral volume and distribution.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2025-ferreira|Ferreira, 2025]] Pixel-wise classification using neural networks.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- STEGO achieved a mean IoU of 0.8 for pyrite segmentation. ([[2025-ferreira|Ferreira, 2025, p. 75]])
